title: Johnny and Yosaku Cross Paths With the Crew
description: On pages 12–15, the Straw Hats settle into life aboard their new ship, raise their pirate flag, and meet Johnny and Yosaku on the way toward a cook.
scene: The crew’s mood is lighter after Syrup Village, but practical problems quickly appear: they need roles, supplies, medical help, and eventually a cook.

dialogue.speaker: Yosaku
dialogue.text: Sick!?

dialogue.speaker: Johnny
dialogue.text: Yeah... He was just fine a couple days ago,

dialogue.speaker: Johnny
dialogue.text: But all of a sudden he turned pale and kept passing out! I don't know what he's come down with...

dialogue.speaker: Johnny
dialogue.text: his teeth have begun to fall out,

dialogue.speaker: Johnny
dialogue.text: And his old wounds have reopened...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I just don't know what to do anymore.

dialogue.speaker: Johnny
dialogue.text: I was trying to at least let him get some rest on top of that rock but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: All of a sudden, this ship fired a cannonball at us!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: W-We're truly, truly sorry.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's fine, what's done is done...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: If all problems could be solved with a simple apology, there wouldn't be any need for policemen.

dialogue.speaker: Yosaku
dialogue.text: "Yosaku and Johnny"... We were infamous enough to have pirates shaking in their boots at the mere mention of our names from time to time.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We've lived and worked together as bounty hunters for years!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Is this... How it's all gonna end!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: God, how thick could you get!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What did you just say!?

dialogue.speaker: Johnny
dialogue.text: Lady, I won't let you go free if you dare to make a mockery of my partner's suffering...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Luffyy! Usopp! There're some times in the kitchen! Go squeeze the juice out and bring it here ASAP!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: R-Roger!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Limes...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: He's afflicted with scurvy.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: If we're not too late, he should recover just fine in a few days.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: A-are you telling me the truth, Sis!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Please don't call me Sis.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: In the past, it was practically a death sentence for sailors.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's caused by lack of nutrients found in fruits and vegetables.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It was quite common back then because ships simply didn't have the technology to effectively store fresh fruits and vegetables for long periods of time...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: WOOOW! You're like a doctor!

dialogue.speaker: Johnny
dialogue.text: Yeah, I always knew that girl was special. Usopp's eyes are never wrong.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: If you're going to be sailing, you should know at least this much! God, your stupidity will be the death of all of you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Alright, I'm charged up on nutrients and ready for action!

dialogue.speaker: Johnny
dialogue.text: haha, my partner's fine now!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Like hell he could recover that fast!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Sorry for the late introducing.

summary: This part acts as a bridge from Syrup Village to Baratie, giving Usopp a place on the crew and steering the story toward Sanji’s introduction.
